page_content:
Prerequisite: HESP724.

Restriction: Must not be in Clinical Audiology: Au.D. or Ph.D. (Doctoral) program.

HESP858 Seminar in Speech Pathology (3 Credits)

Problems in disordered articulation, voice, fluency and dysphagia. Restriction: Must be in one of the following programs (Hearing and Speech Sciences: Ph.D. (Doctoral); Clinical Audiology: Au.D. or Ph.D. (Doctoral); Hearing and Speech Sciences: M.A. (Master's)) ; and permission of instructor.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
